Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenIntelligenceDashboard

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl.ViewRiksdagenIntelligenceDashboard
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewRiksdagenIntelligenceDashboard") public class ViewRiksdagenIntelligenceDashboard extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
JPA entity for view_riksdagen_intelligence_dashboard database view. Intelligence Purpose: Executive intelligence dashboard with stability and coalition assessments providing high-level summary across all risk rules. Created by: Liquibase v1.29 (Intelligence Operations Enhancement) Risk Rules Supported: All 45 rules (executive summary)
